ddls:
CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study */,
  "university" TEXT /* University or institution */,
  "year_completed" INTEGER /* Year the degree was completed */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Grade Point Average (GPA) of the degree */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* More specific field of study within the major */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the skill */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the skill */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any relevant certification related to the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work experience record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held at the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities in the previous role */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements in the previous role */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the previous company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the previous company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating received in the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., Mid-Year, Annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., In Progress, Achieved, Not Achieved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the goal (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who assigned the goal */,
  "assigned_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who assigned the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development plan */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the development plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of development plan (e.g., Training, Mentorship) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who assigned the plan */,
  "assigned_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who assigned the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_structure" (
  "reporting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting relationship */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the reporting relationship became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the reporting relationship ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_search" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "indexed_data" TEXT /* Indexed data for searching */,
  "search_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Demographics, Performance) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "generated_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "succession_planning" (
  "planning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each succession planning record */,
  "position" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "current_holder" INTEGER /* ID of the current holder of the position */,
  "potential_successors" TEXT /* List of potential successors */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Status of the succession planning (e.g., Active, On Hold) */,
  "planning_type" TEXT /* Type of succession planning (e.g., Short-term, Long-term) */,
  "planning_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the planning */,
  "planning_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the planning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Promotion, Transfer) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the change */,
  "approved_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)
